lieux.label: Musée du Mur de l’Atlantique (Grand Bunker)

photos.title: Le Grand Bunker Musée du Mur de l'Atlantique WW II Atlantic Wall museum Ouistreham Normandy France Nazi Germany Wehrmacht fortification weapons equipment exhibitions 2006-02-22 Vessel IMG 5755.jpg
photos.description:
Photo taken on February 22, 2006 at Le Grand Bunker - Museum of the Atlantic Wall (Musée du Mur de l'Atlantique) in 6 Av. du 6 Juin, 14150 Ouistreham in Normandy region in northwestern France.
During the Second World War, Ouistreham was occupied by German troops. From 1942, the beach area became a no man's land; 123 villas by the sea were desmolished to make way for the defenses of the Atlantic Wall: 80 concrete structures and an artillery observation post overlooking the beach “the big bunker”
photos.author: USM MS photos
